title: Cracker's Wither Storm Performance
description: Cracker's Wither Storm Mod, with performance enhancing mods and shader support for the ultimate boss fight.
body:
![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Crackers_Wither_Storm_Performance/BH_CWSP_header.webp)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Crackers_Wither_Storm_Performance/BH_CWSP_promo.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Banner Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Crackers_Wither_Storm_Performance/BH_CWSP_overview.webp)
---
**Cracker's Wither Storm Performance** is a performance focused modpack surrouding the wither storm mod. Designed for players to enjoy a good boss battle without having to worry about performance problems. Feeling fancy? Use the shaders you love while fighting this 100+ block monster!

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/crackers-wither-storm-performance)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/crackers-wither-storm-performance)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
# Features
- [✔️] **Fully Optimised** - Shader ready out of the box.
- [✔️] **Cracker's Wither Storm** - A Monster of blocky proportions! Ready to battle.

[![Banner Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Crackers_Wither_Storm_Performance/BH_CWSP_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
